title: QA: Verify decision log viewer in desktop app
intent: Verify the decision log viewer correctly reads and displays log entries, handles empty state, and integrates with the existing desktop app architecture.
acceptance_criteria: IPC handler uses readLog() from @archon/runtime-host (same code path as CLI archon log)
Component follows existing desktop patterns (LoadState, Zustand store, polling)
Preload API surface extended with decisions.list() method
Empty state renders correctly when decisions.jsonl doesn't exist
